creator: xmj@FreeBSD.org
text:
The patch attached above will fail for every port *but* linux-c6-xorg-libs,
as the paths listed in distinfo.(i386,x86_64) have changed in every port due to the LINUX_DIST_VER modification.

I recommend you look instead into the patch we're preparing - https://reviews.freebsd.org/D3428.
